name: Chinuku Jushi (Mixed Rice with Araimo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain rice for 30 minutes before cooking.
2. Cook taro in water to cover until tender, then peel and dice.
3. Squeeze daikon dry; cut into strips.
4. Remove stems from mushrooms; slice caps.
5. Cut konbu lengthwise, then into fine strips.
6. In a saucepan, add pork, daikon, mushrooms, and konbu. Cook for a few minutes.
7. Stir in chicken broth and soy sauce. Bring to a boil.
8. Lower heat and cook for 15 minutes.
9. Add rice, bring to a boil again.
10. Lower heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
11. Add taro, cook for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Makes 12 servings.
